name: Mandarin Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by mixing all ingredients in a bowl until the sugar is fully dissolved.
2. In a large salad bowl, toss together chopped green onions, parsley (if using), mandarin oranges, and walnuts.
3. Drizzle half of the prepared dressing over the salad and gently mix to combine.
4. Serve immediately or store the remaining dressing for future use in other dishes. Grapefruit slices or avocado wedges can be added instead of mandarin oranges if desired.
